title: USGS California State Waters Map Series — Offshore of San Francisco
steward: U.S. Geological Survey Pacific Coastal and Marine Science Center

coverage.region: Pacific coast and Golden Gate approach offshore of San Francisco

citation: Dartnell, P., Kvitek, R.G., and Bretz, C.K., 2014, Bathymetry—Offshore of San Francisco, California, USGS Data Series 781.
limitations: The source is high resolution but historical; structure may have changed since collection.
The mapped area does not cover most interior San Francisco Bay shoreline sites.
A 2 m pixel does not prove that a 2 m feature is reliably identifiable; CastingCompass uses a conservative three-cell feature threshold.
